etymology.description: 戈(戈) (gē, 'halberd') + phonetic: 魁(魁) (kuí, 'chief') = halberd
etymology.interpretation: The character 戣(kúi, 'halberd') combines the semantic element 戈(戈) (gē, 'halberd') indicating its association with weaponry, with the phonetic component 魁(魁) (kuí, 'chief') to convey its pronunciation.
